name: coding-agent-kit
description: Structured project understanding, planning, implementation, and review workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Project setup, planning, implementation, and review skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A focused Codex workflow kit with reusable skills for scanning projects, writing docs, creating project skills, planning features, implementing one task at a time, and reviewing completed work.
defaultPrompt: Scan this repo and set up Codex guidance.
Review this feature against the plan.
